scope.purpose: incremental official/high-trust source audit before any database or candidate promotion

safety.openPullRequestCheck: Open PR check found only non-overlapping report-generator PR #111 before branch creation; no open PL Athlete Research data PR for this lot range was found.
safety.duplicateCheck: No existing data/research-batches file for lot71-75 audit-run55 was found before creation.
safety.noInferencePolicy: No achievements, same-person identity links, or record claims were inferred from exact-name-only, noisy, or absent search results.

sourceChecks.usedFor: Confirmed roster identities, lot numbers, aliases, and v5.9.6_LOCK preservation target.

sourceChecks.usedFor: Exact-name and unspaced-name checks for Hokkaido domestic PL/BP result rows. No row-level candidate was captured in this batch.

sourceChecks.usedFor: Exact-name checks covering national three-lift PL and single bench press histories. No row-level candidate was captured in this batch.

sourceChecks.name: IPF/Goodlift/APF-AAPF-style web checks
sourceChecks.usedFor: Exact-name and romanized-name checks covering international/world and federation-relevant histories. No row-level candidate was captured in this batch.

result.summary: Lot 71-75 were audited as a small batch. No confirmed history was promoted and no uncertain official/high-trust candidate row was added.
